title: Workshop: Build an Accessible Practice-Guide Character
summary: Workshop: Build an Accessible Practice-Guide Character retrieves prior skills in an original multi-state character illustration with restrained feedback and regression proof scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply css transitions, css keyframes, css animation timing, css animation performance, css reduced motion, css animation debug in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real multi-state character illustration with restrained feedback and regression proof artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.
